from Sean, it appears that the Toy Store still has serial # 18, that you 
flew sometime ago.

(see attachment below for aircraft on market).

phone call from our Sales rep in North America, Sean and I are being told 
Monday,,,18 to 24 month lead time for Green aircraft,,,just FYI.
